tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall address

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # edit "UbuntuComputer-192.168.1.3"
new entry 'UbuntuComputer-192.168.1.3' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (UbuntuComputer-1~1.3) # set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.2 55

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (UbuntuComputer-1~1.3) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall addrgrp

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (addrgrp) # edit "COMPROMISED-HOST"
new entry 'COMPROMISED-HOST' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (COMPROMISED-HOST) # set member "UbuntuComputer-192.168.1.3"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (COMPROMISED-HOST) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (addrgrp) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "ALLOW-UBUNTU-LAN-ICMP-WEB"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer-192.168.1.3"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "PING" "HTTP" "HTTPS"
set logtraffic all
next
edit 0
set name "BLOCK-UBUNTU-OTHER-EGRESS"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer-192.168.1.3"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
end"}
